chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1251 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.5842/2024 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Tahmasp Rasheed Razvi, advocate for the petitioner Dr. Huma Sodhar, advocate for respondent Mr. Abdul Ghaffar, advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Akhtar Hussain Jabbar, advocate for respondent No.6 Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General In this petition notices have been impugned on the premise that a penalty is being levied without any adjudication / show cause notices whatsoever. Learned counsel for the FBR states that this notice shall be withdrawn forthwith and fresh proceedings may be initiated against the petitioner, if instructed and found permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition may be disposed off in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
